title: Yaqiym #3356
definition:
Jakim = "He will raise"

 1) a Benjamite and descendant of Shimhi
 2) a Levite priest in charge of the 12th course in the time of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jakim = "He will raise"

 1) a Benjamite and descendant of Shimhi
 2) a Levite priest in charge of the 12th course in the time of David

    NASB:  He lifts up, two Isr.
